name: voice-mail-backend
description: AI-Powered Voice Based Email Assistant Backend

scripts.fresh: powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -Expand OwningProcess -Unique) -Force -EA SilentlyContinue" && node server.js
scripts.build-apk: npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
